text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 216 

SNF_QUALN_THRU_DT 

LABEL: Ending date of beneficiary’s qualifying SNF stay 

DESCRIPTION: The ending date of the beneficiary's qualifying stay. 

For Inpatient claims, the date relates to the prospective payment system (PPS) portion of the inlier for 
which there is no utilization to benefits. For skilled nursing facility (SNF) claims, the date relates to the 
qualifying stay from a hospital
